MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-05-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Continued To Nov-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Steiner for (citee) Cynthia Silverstein. Peter Stern for Alan Tetenbaum.

The Court asked the parties whether this petition should be taken off calendar or set for trial. Mr. Stern stated that he had expected this to wrap up last year, that he understands that they are on the cusp of selling a piece of property in San Francisco, spoke of the fees involved and stated that he would like the matter to be continued until after the sale of the property. The court stated that it is not willing to grant another continuance and the matter was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial on November 16, 2015, (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Continued To Jun-08-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Status Report
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The status on filing a status report was taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Continued To Jun-01-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Steiner for (trustee) Cynthia Silverstein. Peter Stern (via court call) for Alan Tetenbaum.

Mr. Steiner reported that Ms. Silverstein is not present as she is ill. Mr. Stern reported that the status is further along, that he is disappointed that the trustee has not obtained the cash to pay his clients, that he is agreeable to give more time but would like a status on the Geyserville property and the sale of the painting within a few weeks. Mr. Steiner stated that he has asked for an update on the property and that there has been interest in the purchase of the painting but no results as of this time, that the painting had been sent to Sotheby's for sale and that a 2 week request for status is reasonable. Mr. Stern stated that he does not want to tie up the court with this matter, that his clients want it resolved and that he would like to continue the matter to early June with a request that a status report be filed earlier. The petition for Cynthia B. Silverstein to appear and show cause for contempt was continued to June 1, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204, and status on filing a status report was set for April 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Continued To Apr-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Stern for Alan Tetenbaum.

Mr. Stern noted that Mr. Steiner and Ms. Silverstein were not present, stated that he tried bargaining with the Trustee through her Counsel, that he was informed there was an additional piece of property and that Mr. Steiner has asked for 60 to 90-days to sell the property. Mr. Stern also stated that if nothing occurs by then, he will ask for an order re contempt. The Petition to Appear, etc. was continued to April 6, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

10:30 a.m.

Mr. Steiner and Ms. Silverstein appeared after the hearing had concluded. The Court informed the Parties of the continued date asked them to tend to the matter.

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Sep-22-2014 Continued To Jan-12-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Steiner for Cynthia Silverstein (Trustee). Peter Stern appeared by telephone for Beneficiaries.

Mr. Steiner reported that they are making significant progress, that the money to be paid to the Trust is being done by sale of a painting, that the auction is set on November 20th and asked to return to Court on December 8th. The petition to appear and show cause for contempt was continued to January 12, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Continued To Sep-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Stern made a special appearance for Paul Steiner by telephone.

Mr. Stern requested a continuance stating that they are without an acceptable agreement, that the issue is how they can secure the agreement and that they are unable to get a guaranteed sales price for the painting. The Petition for Cynthia Silverstein to Appear and Show Cause for Contempt was continued to September 22, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jones. (Not Reported)

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar May-19-2014 Continued To Jun-02-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Continued To May-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Stern appeared by telephone for Alan Tetenbaum. Paul Steiner for Cynthia Silverstein.

Mr. Steiner stated that he received some paper work, that when executed will hopefully fully resolve all issues and that there are some technical issues regarding securitizing personal property. Mr. Stern stated that he believes they are close. The Petition to Appear and Show Cause for Contempt was continued to May 19, 2014 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on settlement.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Leonardini. (Not Reported)

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Continued To Mar-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Steiner for Cynthia Silverstein. Peter Stern appeared by telephone for Alan Tetenbaum.

Mr. Steiner stated that Ms. Silverstein was not present due to a family emergency, that he believes they have an agreement and that they need time to do the paper work to secure the property for sale. Mr. Stern stated that he will waive a formal accounting. The Petition for Cynthia Silverstein to Appear and Show Cause for Contempt was continued to March 24, 2014 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for progress of the settlement agreement.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Continued To Feb-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Steiner for and with Cynthia Silverstein (Trustee) and specially appearing for Attorney John Foley and new Counsel coming in.

Mr. Steiner requested a 30-day continuance stating that settlement is pending and that new Counsel is coming in. The Petition to Appear and Show Cause for Contempt was continued to February 24, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Dec-30-2013 Continued To Jan-13-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Steiner for and with Cynthia Silverstein. Paul Steiner also specially appearing on behalf of John Foley for Alan Tetenbaum.

Mr. Steiner requested a continuance stating that they have reached an overall gross settlement, that they have an issue to resolve with regard to a funding matter/sale of a painting, and that there has been an informal accounting that was approved by Mr. Foley and his Client. The Petition for Cynthia Silverstein to appear and Show Cause for Contempt was continued to January 13, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Boncato. (Not Reported)

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Continued To Dec-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Steiner for and with Cynthia Silverstein and also specially appearing for Attorney John Foley.

Mr. Steiner requested a continuance stating that the matter is basically resolved, that all the numbers are agreed to and that the only issue is converting the asset into cash to complete the transaction. The Petition for Cynthia Silverstein to Appear and Show Cause for Contempt was continued to December 30, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead. (Not Reported)

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Steiner for and with Cynthia Silverstein (Respondent) and also making a special appearance on behalf of John Foley for Alan Tetenbaum.

Mr. Steiner requested a continuance stating that there is good movement toward resolving the matter. The Petition for Cynthia Silverstein to Appear and Show Cause for Contempt was continued to December 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. (Not Reported)

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Continued To Nov-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Foley for Petitioner. Michael Rubenstein appearing on a limited basis for Cynthia Silverstein (Respond).

Mr. Rubenstein stated that he was recently retained, that he was only here today for the purpose of getting a hearing scheduled in the future and that Ms. Silverstein has worked to put together an accounting hopefully without further involvement of the Court. Mr. Foley stated that they are working on settlement. The Petition for Cynthia Silverstein to Appear and Show Cause for Contempt was continued to November 5, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Cynthia Silverstein to appear on November 5, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why she should not be punished for contempt. On that date, the Court will set a date for hearing and see where the Parties stand. Mr. Rubenstein accepts service on behalf of Cynthia Silverstein. The Court stated that the Request for Judicial Notice filed on July 5, 2013 carries over.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Cynthia B Silverstein, To Appear And Show Cause For Contempt
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Cynthia B. Silverstein, Successor Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Aug-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Foley for Alan Tetenbaum (Petitioner).

There being no opposition, the Court granted the Petition to Compel Cynthia Silvertsein Successor Trustee to Account (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
